meta.description: A single API endpoint — method, path, auth scope and request/response shape

requestBody.description: Request body description or example (parked as string).

responseBody.description: Response body description or example (parked as string).

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_88657248_047c_4734_983c_7535e3342ffb" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "method" TEXT,
    "path" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "scope" TEXT,
    "is_new" BOOLEAN,
    "deprecated" BOOLEAN,
    "service" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "request_body" TEXT,
    "response_body" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_88657248_047c_4734_983c_7535e3342ffb" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_88657248047c4734_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
